tr.td: Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
Alendronic acid (as alendronate sodium) 10 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (81 mg) by mouth once daily
Atorvastatin (as atorvastatin calcium) 20 mg oral tablet
1 tablet (20 mg) by mouth once daily
Prasugrel (as prasugrel hydrochloride) 10 mg oral tablet
Metoprolol tartrate (as metoprolol succinate) 100 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
1 capsule (220 mg) by mouth every 12 hours as needed
Ferrous sulfate 325 mg prolonged-release oral tablet
1 tablet (325 mg) by mouth once daily
Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Clostridium tetani toxoid antigen adsorbed only vaccine product
Streptococcus pneumoniae Danish serotype 1, 3, 4, 5, 6A, 6B, 7F, 8, 9V, 10A, 11A, 12F, 14, 15B, 18C, 19A, 19F, 22F, 23F, 33F capsular polysaccharide antigens conjugated only vaccine product
Streptococcus pneumoniae Danish serotype 1, 3, 4, 5, 6A, 6B, 7F, 9V, 14, 18C, 19A, 19F, 23F, capsular polysaccharide conjugated antigens only vaccine product
Development of individualized plan of care
Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction (disorder)
Assessment of cardiac status using monitoring device

ul.li: Patient will report a reduction in hip pain severity during daily activities.
Patient will increase ability to walk and perform activities of daily living without significant limitation.
Patient will be able to walk at least 30 minutes per day, 5 days per week.
Patient will implement lifestyle changes to reduce risk of progression to diabetes, including dietary modifications, increased physical activity, and regular blood glucose monitoring.

tr.td: Influenza virus antigen only vaccine product
Pain severity - 0-10 verbal numeric rating [Score] - Reported
Blood pressure panel with all children optional
Leukocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Erythrocytes [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Hematocrit [Volume Fraction] of Blood by Automated count
MCV [Entitic mean volume] in Red Blood Cells by Automated count
MCHC [Entitic Mass/volume] in Red Blood Cells by Automated count
Erythrocyte distribution width [Entitic volume] by Automated count
Platelets [#/volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet distribution width [Entitic volume] in Blood by Automated count
Platelet [Entitic mean volume] in Blood by Automated count
